findings.issue: §02 What it does for you opens with the bold phrase 'Revolutionising apparel manufacturing.' — direct hit on the website-tone-of-voice §7 banned-vocabulary list (revolutionary / revolutionising / transformative are all banned).
findings.fix: Replace with a factual lead, e.g. 'IntelliVerse IS the Manufacturing Execution System (MES) — a unified AI-native vendor OS that connects every stage of the factory.' (drop the 'Revolutionising apparel manufacturing.' opener entirely; the next sentence already carries the meaning.)

findings.issue: Double-encoded ampersands render as the literal string '&' on three places: the audience pill 'Commercial &amp; Audit Teams' and §02 prose 'scattered tools &amp; manual reports' / 'data duplication &amp; loss'. Caused by HTML-encoding being applied twice in the renderer.
findings.fix: In the YAML data file (data/impetus/intelliverse.yaml) replace '&' with '&' for the For-list and What-it-does entries, OR fix the renderer in tools/build_impetus.py to not double-escape ampersands. Then re-render.

findings.issue:
§02 What it does renders a Markdown-style bullet list ('- The challenges (before): … - Key benefits: … - System modules: …') as inline prose within a single

tag. The hyphen-bullets render as literal '- ' characters at the start of pseudo-lines but without list semantics — reads as broken Markdown.
findings.fix: Change the YAML to use a real <ul>/<li> list for the three sub-items (challenges, key benefits, system modules) so they render as a list, not a hyphen-prefixed paragraph. Or rewrite the paragraph as flowing prose without the leading hyphens.

findings.issue: Verbatim list 'Unified Vendor OS · Smarter Pre-Production · Seamless Daily Reporting · Proactive in Quality · Faster to Packing · End-to-End Traceability' carries 'Seamless' (banned per tone-of-voice §7) — sourced from PDF p.31 product-feature framing. Marketing register; would be flagged on a fresh page.
findings.fix: Either keep as quoted PDF text (acceptable if explicitly attributed) or rewrite to neutral verbs ('Daily reporting · Pre-production planning · Quality checks at 10% · Packing acceleration · End-to-end traceability').

findings.issue: Page section numbering jumps from hero eyebrow (no §01) directly to §02. Spec §3 calls §01 the 'For:' line; here it is folded into hero audience pills. Convention is consistent across all 15 generated platform pages but is an undocumented override.
findings.fix: Either add a single 'D{N} · Section ordering — fold §01 For-list into hero pills' decision in the spec §9 Decisions block, OR re-add a small §01 label in the hero. Currently the deviation is implicit and consistent — low priority.

findings.issue: Bold phrase 'PO-to-Shipping cycle: 55 → 30 days (45% faster).' already appears in the hero subhead. Repeating it bolded inside §04 What improved is mild redundancy; not wrong but reads as filler at exec scan.
findings.fix: Drop the bold from the §04 mention OR change it to a different facet (e.g. 'Repeated below for emphasis: …' is wrong) — simply un-bold the §04 instance and let the hero do the work.

strengths: Source traceability is exhaustive — every numerical claim (15.84L POs, 11.85 Cr garments, 372 active suppliers, 506/1245 factories, 461/1377 vendors, 3.8Cr/13.7Cr units, 375/1245, 55→30 days, 10% vs 70%) maps directly to the Q1 2026 Release Compendium (PDF pp.31, p.40 IntelliMake Adoption Stats) — verified word-for-word.

The 22 screenshot cards (034-v2 through 049-v2-b) all return 200 with sensible dimensions; the 4 IntelliQC mobile portrait captures (041, 042, 043, 044 at ~750×1600) and the IntelliPack mobile multi-tenant login (047-v2 at 1169×1600) render properly post-smask compositing — formerly broken white frames are now actual UI.
Lightbox is wired correctly — openImpetusLightbox flips display from 'none' to 'flex' on click and Escape closes, no [hidden]+inline-display:flex collision.
Section numbering (02 → 03 → 04 → 05) is contiguous post Updates-Shipped and Progress deletion — renumbering applied cleanly.

Cross-page references match: home /impetus/ index card 07 reads 'Vendor Management Platform' / 'IntelliVerse (Procuro · IntelliMake · IntelliQC · IntelliPack) — PO to shipping. PO→Ship 55→30 days.' which matches hero verbatim.
